---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "feat: "
labels: "enhancement"
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature or enhancement (1-2 sentences).

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? What gap does it fill?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your preferred approach. Sketches, pseudocode, or config examples are welcome.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why they were rejected (if any).

## OpenSpec Note

This project uses OpenSpec for feature development. If this request is approved, I will:

1. Run `/opsx:propose` to generate a full proposal with specs and tasks
2. Iterate on the design before any code is written
3. Follow the task-driven implementation workflow

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references.
